---
title: "Compare RNASeq Summaries"
author: "Sara gosline"
date: "2025-01-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(tidyverse); library(synapser); library(pheatmap); library(RColorBrewer)
drug.info <- list("Palbociclib" = "CDK inhibitor", "Ribociclib" = "CDK inhibitor",
                  "Trabectedin" = "Chemotherapy", "Ifosfamide" = "DNA alkylating agent",
                  "Decitabine" = "DNMT inhibitor", "Vorinostat" = "HDAC inhibitor",
                  "Mirdametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Selumetinib" = "MEK inhibitor",
                  "Trametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Capmatinib" = "MET inhibitor",
                  "Olaparib" = "PARP inhibitor", "RMC4630" = "SHP2 inhibitor",
                  "TNO155" = "SHP2 inhibitor", "Doxorubicin" = "TOP inhibitor",
                  "Irinotecan" = "TOP inhibitor", "Verteporfin" = "YAP inhibitor")
drug.info <- data.frame(Drug=names(drug.info), MOA = unlist(drug.info))
```

Here we want to compare the various RNAseq analyses. We want to ask:
1. Which drugs elicit the most similar response? 
  - check RNASeq
  - check TF responses
  - check pathways
2. which drugs elicit the most distinct responses? 
  - check RNASeq
  - check TF responses
  - check pathways
3. What are the most profound changes caused by each drug? Do these predict other drugs? 
  - check RNASEq
  - check TF response
  - check pathways

## Get all data so far

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r load data}
synLogin()
#all_exp<-readr::read_csv(synGet('syn64398051')$path)
diffex_genes<-readr::read_csv(synGet('syn64397743')$path)
#diffex_tfs<-readr::read_csv(synGet('syn64420968')$path)
#diff_tf_scores<-readr::read_csv(synGet('syn64695280')$path)
if (any(diffex_genes$Drug=="Trabectidin")) {
  diffex_genes[diffex_genes$Drug=="Trabectidin",]$Drug <- "Trabectedin"
}
diffex_genes <- diffex_genes[diffex_genes$Drug != "Irinotecan",] # since irinotecan isn't metabolically active

##now we have three different ways of comparing the drugs
genemat<-diffex_genes|>
  dplyr::select(ensembl_gene_id,log2FoldChange,individualID,Drug,Timepoint)|>
  subset(!is.na(log2FoldChange))|>
  tidyr::unite(individualID,Timepoint,Drug,col='condition')|>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from=condition,values_from=log2FoldChange,values_fn=mean,values_fill=0.0)|>
  tibble::column_to_rownames('ensembl_gene_id')|>
  as.matrix()

genecor<-cor(genemat,use='pairwise.complete.obs')
write.csv(genecor, "geneCorr.csv")

annot <- as.data.frame(rownames(genecor)) |> 
  tidyr::separate('rownames(genecor)',into=c('MPNST','Timepoint','Drug'),sep='_')
if (any(annot$Drug == "Ribociblib")) {
 annot[annot$Drug == "Ribociblib",]$Drug <- "Ribociclib" 
}
annot <- merge(annot, drug.info, by="Drug", all.x=TRUE)
rownames(annot) <- paste0(annot$MPNST, "_", annot$Timepoint, "_", annot$Drug)
annot <- annot[rownames(genecor),c('MPNST','Timepoint','Drug','MOA')]
annot$Timepoint <- factor(annot$Timepoint, levels=c("8h","24h"))
annot$MPNST <- factor(annot$MPNST, levels=unique(annot$MPNST))
annot$MOA <- factor(annot$MOA, levels=unique(annot$MOA))
annot$Drug <- factor(annot$Drug, levels=unique(annot$Drug))
cols=c(brewer.pal(8,'Dark2'),brewer.pal(15-8,'Set2'))
drug.info <- list("Palbociclib" = "CDK inhibitor", "Ribociclib" = "CDK inhibitor",
                  "Trabectedin" = "Chemotherapy", "Ifosfamide" = "DNA alkylating agent",
                  "Decitabine" = "DNMT inhibitor", "Vorinostat" = "HDAC inhibitor",
                  "Mirdametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Selumetinib" = "MEK inhibitor",
                  "Trametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Capmatinib" = "MET inhibitor",
                  "Olaparib" = "PARP inhibitor", "RMC4630" = "SHP2 inhibitor",
                  "TNO155" = "SHP2 inhibitor", "Doxorubicin" = "TOP inhibitor",
                  "Irinotecan" = "TOP inhibitor")
names(cols) <- names(drug.info)
cols <- cols[levels(annot$Drug)]
moa.cols <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(length(unique(annot$MOA)),"Set3")
names(moa.cols) <- levels(annot$MOA)
mpnst.cols <- scales::hue_pal()(length(unique(annot$MPNST)))
names(mpnst.cols) <- levels(annot$MPNST)
annot.colors = list(MOA = moa.cols,
                    Drug = cols,
                    Timepoint = c("8h" = "#FFFFFF", "24h" = "#000000"),
                    MPNST = mpnst.cols)

graphics.off()
pdf("geneCorr.pdf",width=6,height=4.5)
pheatmap(genecor, annotation_row=annot, annotation_col=annot,
         annotation_colors=annot.colors,
         show_colnames=FALSE, show_rownames=FALSE)
dev.off()

genemat<-diffex_genes[diffex_genes$padj < 0.05,]|>
  dplyr::select(ensembl_gene_id,log2FoldChange,individualID,Drug,Timepoint)|>
  subset(!is.na(log2FoldChange))|> #subset(!is.na(padj))|> #subset(padj<0.05)|>
  tidyr::unite(individualID,Timepoint,Drug,col='condition')|>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from=condition,values_from=log2FoldChange,values_fn=mean,values_fill=0.0)|>
  tibble::column_to_rownames('ensembl_gene_id')|>
  as.matrix()

genecor<-cor(genemat,use='pairwise.complete.obs')
write.csv(genecor,"degCorr.csv")
# annot <- as.data.frame(rownames(genecor)) |> 
#   tidyr::separate('rownames(genecor)',into=c('MPNST','Timepoint','Drug'),sep='_')
# if (any(annot$Drug == "Ribociblib")) {
#  annot[annot$Drug == "Ribociblib",]$Drug <- "Ribociclib" 
# }
# annot <- merge(annot, drug.info, by="Drug", all.x=TRUE)
# rownames(annot) <- paste0(annot$MPNST, "_", annot$Timepoint, "_", annot$Drug)
# annot <- annot[rownames(genecor),c('MPNST','Timepoint','Drug','MOA')]
# annot$Timepoint <- factor(annot$Timepoint, levels=c("8h","24h"))

graphics.off()
pdf("degCorr.pdf",width=6,height=4.5)
pheatmap(genecor, annotation_row=annot, annotation_col=annot, annotation_colors=annot.colors,
         show_colnames=FALSE, show_rownames=FALSE)
dev.off()

subset(diffex_genes,padj<0.05)|>group_by(individualID,Drug,Timepoint,direction)|>
  summarize(ngenes=n_distinct(hgnc_symbol))|>
  mutate(dgenes=ifelse(direction=='down',-log10(ngenes),log10(ngenes)))|>
  ggplot(aes(x=Drug,fill=direction,#fill=Timepoint,
             y=dgenes))+geom_bar(stat='identity',position='dodge',alpha=0.75)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(-4,-2,0,2,4), labels=c(-10^4, -10^2, 0, 10^2, 10^4)) + #scale_y_continuous(transform=scales::transform_exp(base=10)) + #theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  facet_grid(Timepoint ~ individualID) + scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red")) +
  labs(y='# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)', fill="Direction")+coord_flip()
ggsave("Ndegs_log10Scale.pdf", width=5.5, height=5)

subset(diffex_genes,padj<0.05)|>group_by(individualID,Drug,Timepoint,direction)|>
  summarize(ngenes=n_distinct(hgnc_symbol))|>
  mutate(dgenes=ifelse(direction=='down',-ngenes,ngenes))|>
  ggplot(aes(x=Drug,fill=direction,#fill=Timepoint,
             y=dgenes))+geom_bar(stat='identity',position='dodge',alpha=0.75)+
  facet_grid(Timepoint ~ individualID) + scale_fill_manual(values=c("blue","red")) +
  labs(y='# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)', fill="Direction")+coord_flip()
ggsave("Ndegs.pdf", width=5.5, height=5)

drug.info <- list("Palbociclib" = "CDK inhibitor", "Ribociclib" = "CDK inhibitor",
                  "Trabectidin" = "Chemotherapy", "Ifosfamide" = "DNA alkylating agent",
                  "Decitabine" = "DNMT inhibitor", "Vorinostat" = "HDAC inhibitor",
                  "Mirdametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Selumetinib" = "MEK inhibitor",
                  "Trametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Capmatinib" = "MET inhibitor",
                  "Olaparib" = "PARP inhibitor", "RMC4630" = "SHP2 inhibitor",
                  "TNO155" = "SHP2 inhibitor", "Doxorubicin" = "TOP inhibitor",
                  "Irinotecan" = "TOP inhibitor", "Verteporfin" = "YAP inhibitor")
all.drugs <- names(drug.info)
timepoints <- c("8h","24h")
diffex_genes$log2FoldChange <- as.numeric(diffex_genes$log2FoldChange)
n.top.list <- c(1, 2, 3, 5)
for (n.top in n.top.list) {
  ### pathway
  topSigpathway <- data.frame()
  for (i in all.drugs) {
    tempSig <- diffex_genes[diffex_genes$Drug == i &
                              diffex_genes$signif,] %>% slice_max(abs(log2FoldChange), n=n.top)
    topSigpathway <- rbind(topSigpathway, tempSig)
  }
  length(unique(topSigpathway$hgnc_symbol)) # 20
  dot.df <- na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$hgnc_symbol %in% unique(topSigpathway$hgnc_symbol),])
  
  mean.results <- plyr::ddply(dot.df, .(hgnc_symbol), summarize,
                              Log2FC = mean(log2FoldChange, na.rm=TRUE))
  setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$Log2FC),]$hgnc_symbol
  drugOrder <- unlist(drug.info)
  
  dot.df$Timepoint <- factor(dot.df$Timepoint, levels=timepoints)
  dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log10(dot.df$padj)
  maxAbsscore <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$log2FoldChange)))
  dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    dot.df,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = Drug, y = hgnc_symbol, color = log2FoldChange,
      size = minusLogFDR
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point() +
    ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=all.drugs) +
    scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                          limits=c(-maxAbsscore, maxAbsscore)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
    ggplot2::labs(color = "Log2FC", size = "-log(FDR)") + 
    theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
          axis.title = element_blank()) +
    geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, signif), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
    facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)
  dot.plot
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topDEGs_dotPlot.pdf"), dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(n.top<2,4,2*n.top))
}
# there were ensembl ids which mapped to the same gene

n.top.list <- c(10, 20, 30, 50)
for (n.top in n.top.list) {
  dot.df <- na.omit(diffex_genes) %>% slice_max(abs(log2FoldChange), n=n.top)
  
  mean.results <- plyr::ddply(dot.df, .(hgnc_symbol), summarize,
                              Log2FC = mean(log2FoldChange, na.rm=TRUE))
  setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$Log2FC),]$hgnc_symbol
  drugOrder <- unlist(drug.info)
  
  dot.df$Timepoint <- factor(dot.df$Timepoint, levels=timepoints)
  dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log10(dot.df$padj)
  maxAbsscore <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$log2FoldChange)))
  dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    dot.df,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = Drug, y = hgnc_symbol, color = log2FoldChange,
      size = minusLogFDR
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point() +
    ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=all.drugs) +
    scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                          limits=c(-maxAbsscore, maxAbsscore)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
    ggplot2::labs(color = "Log2FC", size = "-log(FDR)") + 
    theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
          axis.title = element_blank()) +
    geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, signif), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
    facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)
  dot.plot
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topDEGsOverall_dotPlot.pdf"), dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(n.top<16,4,n.top/4))
}

drug.targets <- read.csv("comboPrediction_usingTop500Sig/target_diffexp.csv")
dot.df <- na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$hgnc_symbol %in% drug.targets$hgnc_symbol,]) #%>% slice_max(abs(log2FoldChange), n=n.top)

mean.results <- plyr::ddply(dot.df, .(hgnc_symbol), summarize,
                            Log2FC = mean(log2FoldChange, na.rm=TRUE))
setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$Log2FC),]$hgnc_symbol
drugOrder <- rownames(drug.info)
timepoints <- c("8h","24h")
dot.df$Timepoint <- factor(dot.df$Timepoint, levels=timepoints)
dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log10(dot.df$padj)
maxAbsscore <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$log2FoldChange)))
dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  dot.df,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = Drug, y = hgnc_symbol, color = log2FoldChange,
    size = minusLogFDR
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                        limits=c(-maxAbsscore, maxAbsscore)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::labs(color = "Log2FC", size = "-log(FDR)") + 
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
        axis.title = element_blank()) +
  geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, signif), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
  facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)
dot.plot
ggplot2::ggsave("targetDiffExp_dotPlot.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(length(setOrder)<16,4,length(setOrder)/4))

dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  dot.df,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = Drug, y = hgnc_symbol, color = log2FoldChange,
    size = minusLogFDR
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point() +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                        limits=c(-maxAbsscore, maxAbsscore)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::labs(color = "Log2FC", size = "-log(FDR)") + 
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
        axis.title = element_blank()) +
  geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, signif), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
  facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)
dot.plot
ggplot2::ggsave("targetDiffExp_dotPlot_alphabeticalOrder.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(length(setOrder)<16,4,length(setOrder)/2.67))

ggplot2::ggsave("targetDiffExp_dotPlot_alphabeticalOrder_shorter.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(length(setOrder)<16,4,length(setOrder)/3.5))

dot.df <- na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$hgnc_symbol %in% drug.targets$hgnc_symbol,]) #%>% slice_max(abs(log2FoldChange), n=n.top)
sig.dot.df <- dot.df[dot.df$signif,]
dot.df <- dot.df[dot.df$hgnc_symbol %in% sig.dot.df$hgnc_symbol,]

drugOrder <- rownames(drug.info)
timepoints <- c("8h","24h")
dot.df$Timepoint <- factor(dot.df$Timepoint, levels=timepoints)
dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log10(dot.df$padj)
maxAbsscore <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$log2FoldChange)))
dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  dot.df,
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = Drug, y = hgnc_symbol, color = log2FoldChange,
    size = minusLogFDR
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point() +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                        limits=c(-maxAbsscore, maxAbsscore)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::labs(color = "Log2FC", size = "-log(FDR)") + 
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
        axis.title = element_blank()) +
  geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, signif), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
  facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)
dot.plot
ggplot2::ggsave("sigTargetDiffExp_dotPlot_alphabeticalOrder.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(length(setOrder)<16,4,length(setOrder)/2.67))

ggplot2::ggsave("sigTargetDiffExp_dotPlot_alphabeticalOrder_shorter.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(length(setOrder)<16,4,length(setOrder)/3.5))

diffex_genes$Timepoint <- factor(diffex_genes$Timepoint, levels=c("8h","24h"))
Nbar <- ggplot2::ggplot(na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$signif,]), aes(x=Drug, fill=Timepoint)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="count") + facet_wrap(.~individualID) + theme_classic() + 
  scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1, vjust=1),
                                             axis.title.x=element_blank()) + 
  ylab("# of Differentially\nExpressed Genes")
ggsave("nSigDEGs.pdf", Nbar, width=10, height=2)

Ndegs <- plyr::ddply(na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$signif,]), .(individualID, Timepoint, Drug),summarize,
                     n=length(unique(hgnc_symbol)))
Ndegs$Timepoint <- factor(Ndegs$Timepoint, levels=c("8h","24h"))
Nbar <- ggplot2::ggplot(Ndegs, aes(x=Drug, y=n, fill=Timepoint)) + 
  geom_bar(stat="identity", position="dodge") + facet_wrap(.~individualID) + 
  theme_classic() + scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") + 
  scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) + 
  theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1, vjust=1),
        axis.title.x=element_blank()) + 
  ylab("# of Differentially\nExpressed Genes")
ggsave("nSigDEGs_log10.pdf", Nbar, width=10, height=2)
write.csv(Ndegs, "nSigDEGs.csv", row.names=FALSE)

# does JH-2-002 have earlier response than MN-2?
jh2.time.degs <- t.test(Ndegs[Ndegs$individualID=="JH-2-002" & Ndegs$Timepoint=="8h",]$n, 
                         Ndegs[Ndegs$individualID=="JH-2-002" & Ndegs$Timepoint=="24h",]$n)
mn2.time.degs <- t.test(Ndegs[Ndegs$individualID=="MN-2" & Ndegs$Timepoint=="8h",]$n, 
                         Ndegs[Ndegs$individualID=="MN-2" & Ndegs$Timepoint=="24h",]$n)

# upset plots for each MPNST
for (m in unique(diffex_genes$individualID)) {
  # generate list of significant results
  sigList <- list()
  for (i in unique(diffex_genes$Drug)) {
    if (nrow(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$Drug == i & 
                          diffex_genes$individualID == m & diffex_genes$signif,]) > 0) {
      sigList[[i]] <- na.omit(unique(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$Drug == i & 
                                                    diffex_genes$individualID == m & 
                                                    diffex_genes$signif,]$source)) 
    }
  }
  
  if (length(sigList) > 1) {
    # convert to matrix
    myPlot = ComplexHeatmap::make_comb_mat(sigList)
    pdf(file.path(tf.path,paste0(m,"_enrichedTF_upsetPlot.pdf")))
    up <- ComplexHeatmap::UpSet(myPlot)
    ComplexHeatmap::draw(up)
    dev.off()
  }
}

# need to redo TF analysis with individualID
# tfmat<-diffex_tfs|>
#   dplyr::select(source,individualID, Drug,Timepoint,score)|>
#   tidyr::unite(individualID,Timepoint,Drug,col='condition')|>
#     tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from=condition,values_from=score,values_fill=0.0)|>
#   tibble::column_to_rownames('source')|>
#   as.matrix()
# 
# subset(diffex_tfs,padj<0.01)|>
#   mutate(direction=ifelse(score<0,'down','up'))|>
#   group_by(individualID,Drug,Timepoint,direction)|>
#   summarize(ngenes=n_distinct(source))|>
#   mutate(dgenes=ifelse(direction=='down',ngenes*-1,ngenes))|>
#   ggplot(aes(x=Drug,#fill=Timepoint,
#              y=dgenes))+
#   geom_bar(stat='identity',position='dodge')+facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)+
#   ggtitle('Differentially expressed TFs at each time point for each drug')+coord_flip()
# 
# 
# tfcor<-cor(tfmat,use='pairwise.complete.obs')
# #pheatmap(tfcor,main='TF score based correlation')
# 
# tfpmat<-diff_tf_scores|>
#   dplyr::select(TF,individualID,Drug,tfChange,Timepoint)|>
#   tidyr::unite(individualID,Timepoint,Drug,col='condition')|>
#   tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from='condition',values_from=tfChange,values_fill=0.0)|>
#   tibble::column_to_rownames('TF')|>
#   as.matrix()
# 
# diff_tf_scores|>
#   mutate(ep=rank(tfChange)/length(tfChange))|>
#   subset(ep<0.05|ep>0.95)|>
#   mutate(direction=ifelse(tfChange<0,'down','up'))|>
#   group_by(individualID,Timepoint,Drug,direction)|>
#   summarize(ngenes=n_distinct(TF))|>
#   mutate(dgenes=ifelse(direction=='down',ngenes*-1,ngenes))|>
#   ggplot(aes(x=Drug,#fill=Timepoint,
#              y=dgenes))+geom_bar(stat='identity',position='dodge')+
#   facet_grid(Timepoint ~ individualID) +
#   ggtitle('Differentially expressed Priori TFs at each time point for each drug')+coord_flip()
# 
# tfpcor<-cor(tfpmat,use='pairwise.complete.obs')
# #pheatmap(tfpcor,main='Priori tf score correlation')

```

Conclusion: 8 hours is the most informative time point overall. Mirda and doxorubicin show more changes at 24 hrs. 

```{r box and whisker, echo=FALSE}
# prep data
drug.info <- list("Palbociclib" = "CDK inhibitor", "Ribociclib" = "CDK inhibitor",
                  "Trabectidin" = "Chemotherapy", "Ifosfamide" = "DNA alkylating agent",
                  "Decitabine" = "DNMT inhibitor", "Vorinostat" = "HDAC inhibitor",
                  "Mirdametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Selumetinib" = "MEK inhibitor",
                  "Trametinib" = "MEK inhibitor", "Capmatinib" = "MET inhibitor",
                  "Olaparib" = "PARP inhibitor", "RMC4630" = "SHP2 inhibitor",
                  "TNO155" = "SHP2 inhibitor", "Doxorubicin" = "TOP inhibitor",
                  "Irinotecan" = "TOP inhibitor", "Verteporfin" = "YAP inhibitor")
diffex_genes <- read.csv(synapser::synGet('syn64397743')$path)
diffex_genes$Drug <- factor(diffex_genes$Drug, levels=names(drug.info))
timepoints <- c("8h", "24h")
diffex_genes$Timepoint <- factor(diffex_genes$Timepoint, levels=timepoints)
individualID <- c("MN-2", "JH-2-002")
all.drugs <- levels(diffex_genes$Drug)
all.moas <- sort(unique(unlist(drug.info)))
drugCol <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(length(all.drugs),"Set3"))(length(all.drugs)) # need color ramp for >12 colors
names(drugCol) <- all.drugs

sig.tf <- na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$padj <= 0.05 & diffex_genes$individualID %in% individualID,])
ntfs <- plyr::ddply(sig.tf, .(individualID, Drug, Timepoint), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(hgnc_symbol))))
ntfs.overall <- plyr::ddply(sig.tf, .(Drug, Timepoint), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(hgnc_symbol))))

# are there more/less enriched tfs at 8h vs. 24h? No, p = 0.9211
for (m in individualID) {
 cat(m, "# of DEGs at 8h vs. 24h\n")
  t.test(ntfs[ntfs$individualID==m & ntfs$Timepoint=="8h",]$N, 
         ntfs[ntfs$individualID==m & ntfs$Timepoint=="24h",]$N) 
}
cat("Overall", "# of DEGs at 8h vs. 24h\n")
t.test(ntfs.overall[ntfs.overall$Timepoint=="8h",]$N, 
       ntfs.overall[ntfs.overall$Timepoint=="24h",]$N)

cat("Overall", "# of DEGs in MN-2 vs. JH-2-002\n") # similar (p=0.4545)
t.test(ntfs[ntfs$individualID=="MN-2",]$N, 
       ntfs[ntfs$individualID=="JH-2-002",]$N)

ntfs$moa <- NA
ntfs.overall$moa <- NA
for (i in all.moas) {
  temp.drugs <- names(drug.info[drug.info %in% i])
  if (any(ntfs$Drug %in% temp.drugs)) {
   ntfs[ntfs$Drug %in% temp.drugs,]$moa <- i 
   ntfs.overall[ntfs.overall$Drug %in% temp.drugs,]$moa <- i
  }
}

# generate plot
ntfs$moa <- factor(ntfs$moa, levels=all.moas)
ntf.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(ntfs, aes(x=Timepoint, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Drug, shape=moa)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
  scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)",
       color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + 
  theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal") + facet_wrap(~individualID)
ggplot2::ggsave("N_DEGs.pdf", ntf.plot, width=6, height=4.5)

ntfs.overall$moa <- factor(ntfs.overall$moa, levels=all.moas)
ntf.plot.overall <- ggplot2::ggplot(ntfs.overall, aes(x=Timepoint, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=Drug, shape=moa)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)",
       color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_DEGs_overall.pdf", ntf.plot.overall, width=6, height=4.5)


# # just MN-2
# sig.tf <- na.omit(diffex_genes[diffex_genes$padj <= 0.05,])
# ntfs <- plyr::ddply(sig.tf, .(Drug, Timepoint), dplyr::summarize,
#                     N = length(na.omit(unique(hgnc_symbol))))
# # generate plot
# ntfs$moa <- NA
# for (i in all.moas) {
#   temp.drugs <- names(drug.info[drug.info %in% i])
#   if (any(ntfs$Drug %in% temp.drugs)) {
#    ntfs[ntfs$Drug %in% temp.drugs,]$moa <- i 
#   }
# }
# ntfs$moa <- factor(ntfs$moa, levels=all.moas)
# ntf.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(ntfs, aes(x=Timepoint, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
#   geom_point(aes(color=Drug, shape=moa)) +
#   geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
#   scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
#   labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)",
#        color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
#   scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + 
#   theme_classic(base_size=12) +
#   theme(legend.box="horizontal")
# ggplot2::ggsave("N_DEGs_MN-2.pdf", ntf.plot, width=6, height=4.5)
# sig.tf$individualID <- "MN-2"
# 
# JH2.de <- read.csv("totalRNASeqDiffExtoDate.csv")
# JH2.de <- na.omit(JH2.de[JH2.de$padj <= 0.05 & JH2.de$individualID == "JH-2-002",])
# all.sig.tf <- rbind(sig.tf, JH2.de)
# 
# ntfs <- plyr::ddply(all.sig.tf, .(individualID, Drug, Timepoint), dplyr::summarize,
#                     N = length(na.omit(unique(hgnc_symbol))))
# ntfs.overall <- plyr::ddply(all.sig.tf, .(Drug, Timepoint), dplyr::summarize,
#                     N = length(na.omit(unique(hgnc_symbol))))
# 
# # are there more/less enriched tfs at 8h vs. 24h? No, p = 0.2003
# for (m in individualID) {
#  cat(m, "# of DEGs at 8h vs. 24h\n")
#   t.test(ntfs[ntfs$individualID==m & ntfs$Timepoint=="8h",]$N, 
#          ntfs[ntfs$individualID==m & ntfs$Timepoint=="24h",]$N) 
# }
# cat("Overall", "# of DEGs at 8h vs. 24h\n") # no difference, p = 0.7106 when Sara swapped samples back; 20250416: p = 0.3314
# t.test(ntfs.overall[ntfs.overall$Timepoint=="8h",]$N, 
#        ntfs.overall[ntfs.overall$Timepoint=="24h",]$N)
# 
# cat("Overall", "# of DEGs in MN-2 vs. JH-2-002\n") # no difference, p = 0.06382 when Sara swapped samples back; 20250416: p=0.0008461 (MN-2 has more DEGs than JH-2-002)
# t.test(ntfs[ntfs$individualID=="MN-2",]$N, 
#        ntfs[ntfs$individualID=="JH-2-002",]$N)
# 
# ntfs$moa <- NA
# ntfs.overall$moa <- NA
# for (i in all.moas) {
#   temp.drugs <- names(drug.info[drug.info %in% i])
#   if (any(ntfs$Drug %in% temp.drugs)) {
#    ntfs[ntfs$Drug %in% temp.drugs,]$moa <- i 
#    ntfs.overall[ntfs.overall$Drug %in% temp.drugs,]$moa <- i
#   }
# }
# 
# # generate plot
# ntfs$moa <- factor(ntfs$moa, levels=all.moas)
# ntf.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(ntfs, aes(x=Timepoint, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
#   geom_point(aes(color=Drug, shape=moa)) +
#   geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
#   scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
#   labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)",
#        color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
#   scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + 
#   theme_classic(base_size=12) +
#   theme(legend.box="horizontal") + facet_wrap(~individualID)
# ggplot2::ggsave("N_DEGs_v2.pdf", ntf.plot, width=6, height=4.5)
# 
# ntfs.overall$moa <- factor(ntfs.overall$moa, levels=all.moas)
# ntf.plot.overall <- ggplot2::ggplot(ntfs.overall, aes(x=Timepoint, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
#   geom_point(aes(color=Drug, shape=moa)) +
#   geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
#   labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Differentially Expressed Genes (q < 0.05)",
#        color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
#   scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
#   theme(legend.box="horizontal")
# ggplot2::ggsave("N_DEGs_overall_v2.pdf", ntf.plot.overall, width=6, height=4.5)



```

## UMAP plots of data

We can first get a handle on the data similarities via dimensionality reduction.


```{r umaps, echo=FALSE}
library(umap)

plotU<-function(umapres){
  layout<-umapres$layout
  colnames(layout)<-c('dim1','dim2')
  layout<-as.data.frame(layout)|>tibble::rownames_to_column('condition')|>
    tidyr::separate(condition,into=c('individualID','Timepoint','Drug'),sep='_')|>
    ggplot(aes(x=dim1,y=dim2,col=Drug,shape=Timepoint))+geom_point()+ggrepel::geom_label_repel(aes(label=Drug))+
    facet_wrap(~individualID)
}

geneu<-umap(t(genemat))


#tfu<-umap(t(tfmat))
#tfpu<-umap(t(tfpmat))

ug<-plotU(geneu)
#ut<-plotU(tfu)
#up<-plotU(tfpu)


#cowplot::plot_grid(ug,ut,up,nrow=2)
ug+ggtitle("Gene based UMAP")
#ut+ggtitle("TF based UMAP")
#up+ggtitle("Priori TF based UMAP")

```

I really think that the TF scores from decoupler are the best way to reduce dimensionality, the Prior scores don't look right.

## Top TFs for each drug

Let's go into every drug/time point, get the top TFs and maybe the associated genes to see what is happening??

```{r tf analysis}
##get collecTRI network
net<-readr::read_csv(synGet('syn64713359')$path)

###not sure what to do here, goal is to plot/visualize individual TF networks...
plotTfNet<-function(tf,net,data){
  library(pheatmap)
  tfnet<-subset(net,source==tf)
  
  sigtreats<-diffex_tfs|>subset(source==tf)|>#subset(signif)|>
    dplyr::rename(TFsig='signif')|>
    mutate(tfDir=ifelse(score<0,'down','up'))|>
    dplyr::select(-padj)
  #print(paste('found',nrow(sigtreats),'conditions where',tf,'is significant'))
  
  dd<-data|>
    subset(!is.na(signif))|>
    subset(!is.na(direction))|>
    subset(hgnc_symbol%in%c(tf,tfnet$target))|>
    left_join(sigtreats)
    
      #  subset(signif)

#  okabe <- c("#E69F00", "#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442", "#0072B2", "#D55E00", "#CC79A7")

  fig<-dd|>subset(signif)|>ggplot(aes(x=Drug,y=log2FoldChange,fill=TFsig))+
    facet_grid(Timepoint~individualID)+geom_boxplot(outliers=FALSE)+
    geom_jitter(aes(shape=direction,col=TFsig))+
    ggtitle(paste("Fold change changing genes downstream of",tf))#+scale_fill_discrete(okabe)
  
  
  #
  #pheatmap(log10(genes+0.001),annotation_col = meta,clustering_distance_rows='correlation',
  #clustering_distance_cols='correlation',main=paste0(tf,' targets after ',time,' ',drug,' treatment'))
  return(fig)  
    
}

plotTfNet('EGR1',net,diffex_genes)
plotTfNet('SP1',net,diffex_genes)
plotTfNet('STAT1',net,diffex_genes)
#plotTfNet('NFKB1_NFK2',net,diffex_genes)

plotTfNet('HDAC1',net,diffex_genes)

```
